summary: Fair audience recording captures a very good Charlotte show highlighted by an instrumental Dark Star and a standout Satisfaction encore.
review: Fans recall the June 18 Charlotte Coliseum concert as an "A"‑level performance, with a memorable Dark Star jam and a rousing Satisfaction encore that many still talk about. The tape – likely an audience recording from the venue’s “taper section” – is decent but not pristine; some listeners note heat‑induced hiss and a less than ideal PA mix. Overall the show shines despite the mixed audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the performance highly (A‑show, Dark Star and Satisfaction praised) while recording comments are split between decent and sub‑par sound, yielding a combined weighted score around 3.7.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape recorded in the Coliseum’s taper section; described as "pretty good" with possible hypercardiods, but also noted heat‑related noise and a weak PA sound in the venue.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second night of a two‑night run; described as a relaxed, well‑played set that built to an instrumental Dark Star and closed with a high‑energy Satisfaction encore.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned positively ("Jerry on stage") but no specific performance details.
